bead.title: server: replace ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec with unified spec in workers
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Worker persistence and runtime execution still use a server-local ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec, so fields present at cobra or wire boundaries can be lost before spec.json or runWorker consumes them.

ROOT CAUSE
cli/internal/server/workers.go:25-49 defines ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec without MaxCostUSD, RequestTimeout, MinPower, MaxPower, FromRev, or SpecVersion. cli/internal/server/workers.go:658-845 builds CLIOverrides and ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime from that incomplete spec, so runWorker cannot honor those fields on server-spawned workers.

PROPOSED FIX
- Replace ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec with executeloop.ExecuteLoopSpec, or make ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec a temporary type alias to executeloop.ExecuteLoopSpec if needed for a mechanical migration.
- Persist the fully resolved unified spec to .ddx/workers/<id>/spec.json after ApplyDefaults has already run.
- Update lifecycleStartDetail, StartExecuteLoop, buildRoutePreflight, runWorker, and test literals to consume the unified spec.
- Ensure runWorker passes MaxCostUSD, RequestTimeout, MinPower, MaxPower, OpaquePassthrough, and FromRev into config/loop/runtime paths, with escalation.DefaultMaxCostUSD used only as the zero-value fallback.
- Keep disk reads tolerant of unknown legacy fields such as min_tier and max_tier.

NON-SCOPE
- Do not change queue picking, route preflight policy, landing behavior, or watchdog behavior.
- Do not implement REST/GraphQL decode changes here except compile fixes.
- Do not change LabelFilter semantics.
bead.acceptance:
1. cli/internal/server/workers.go no longer defines a server-local ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec struct; instead uses executeloop.ExecuteLoopSpec directly (or a confirmed type alias).
2. Fully resolved spec (after ApplyDefaults) persisted to .ddx/workers/<id>/spec.json.
3. lifecycleStartDetail, StartExecuteLoop, buildRoutePreflight, runWorker, and test literals updated to consume the unified spec.
4. runWorker passes MaxCostUSD, RequestTimeout, MinPower, MaxPower, OpaquePassthrough, and FromRev into config/loop/runtime paths; escalation.DefaultMaxCostUSD used only as zero-value fallback.
5. Legacy disk reads tolerate unknown fields (min_tier, max_tier) without error.
6. TestWorkers_ServerSpawnedWorker_HonorsMaxCostUSD verifies MaxCostUSD from spec reaches the executor.
7. TestWorkers_UnifiedSpec_PersistsToSpecJson verifies spec.json contains all fields after ApplyDefaults.
8. cd cli && go test ./internal/server/... green.
9. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
